titleStmt.title: SII 28.123: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 123. (A.R. No. 278 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, south wall.
Probably the king of this record was the same as the one cited in No. 121 above (Vikrama-Pāṇḍya)

This records a royal order granting 116 vēli of land in Āḍūr alias Jananāthanallūr and some other villages, after purchasing the same from several persons and after excepting 2(1/2) vēlis consisting of the devadāna of Tiruppulīśvaram-uḍaiyār and the local Nāyaṉmār, in 116 shares, 108 to the chaturvvēdi-bhaṭṭar plus one share for Ulagaimuḻudumuḍaiya-piḷḷaiyār, two for vēda-vṟitti, one as vaidya-vṟitti, two for āśu-makkaḷ, two as maḍappuṟam for Parañjōti-dēvar Tiruvaiyāṟu-uḍaiyār for setting up an (agaram) named Ulagai-muḻudum-uḍaiya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam on the western side of Perumpaṟṟappuliyūr, a taṉiyūr. The land was given the status of bhūdāna-iṟai-ili (land gifted as tax-free). However, the grantees were asked to remit at the rate of 4 kalam of paddy (pōṉaka-ppaḻa-nellu) per vēli, measured by ūr-iḷaṅkāl (per year or per crop it is not specified) to the treasury of Tillai-nāyakaṉ, just as the brahmins of Vikkirama-pāṇḍiyachcharuppēdimaṅgalam were doing. Further the bhaṭṭas were asked to take turns, with eleven of them doing benediction (āśīrvvādam) after the circumambulation of the deity at the time of śri-bali (main food-offering to the deity at mid-day) in the shrine/temple of Nāchchiyār (goddess consort)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil kaṇkāṇi karaṇattāṟkku taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟapuliyūril melpāl Ulakai muḻutum Uṭaiya caturvvetimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukku Iṭṭa nattattukku Ellaiyāvatu Irājākkaḷ nāyaṉ tiruttoppukku meṟkum kūli cevakappiḷḷaiyār koyilukku vaṭakkum paḷḷipaṭai Akarattiṉi(ṉi)
ṟum kuḷattukkup pokiṟa Oḻukkaikkuk kiḻakku paḷḷipaṭai Akarattu teṟkil teruvil teṉciṟakil maṉaiyuṭpaṭakkol Eḻu nikki ItukkaRead itukkuteṟkku nāṉkellai Uḷppaṭa nattattil caturvvetipaṭṭarkaḷ per nūṟṟueṭṭum Ulakai muḻutuṭaiya piḷḷaiyārkkup paṅku Oṉṟum pala vedavrattikaḷukkup paṅku Iraṇṭum vaidyavratti paṅku Oṉṟum grāmattil Ācu makkaḷukkup paṅku Iraṇṭum
parañcoti tevar tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyārkku maṭappuṟamākak kuṭutta paṅku Iraṇṭum Āka caturvvedimaṅkalattu paṭṭarkaḷ Uḷppaṭap paṅku nūṟṟu Orupattāṟukkum bhūtāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr viranārāyaṇamāṉa śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya ssaturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākaiyil Īcāṉa tevarum pāṟivākaṉa tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉāṉa karikāla coḻak kaṭampātarā
yaṉum tillai muvāyirak kaṭampātarāyaṉum cāttamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ coḻa viccātarap pallavaraiyanum Uḷḷiṭṭārum kāṇiyāy Ivarkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Āṭurāṉa jaṉanātanallūrkkuk kiḻpāṟkellai pālāṟṟukku meṟkkum tenmpāṟkkellai garūṭavāhaṉa vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai pukaḻāparaṇukkum Aiñcaṟutikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirunallūr Ellai
kkut teṟkkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Aṟupattiraṇṭarai veliyil Uṭaiyār tiruppuliśvaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉamum Uḷḷur nāyaṉmār devadāṉamum nilam Iraṇṭarai nīkki nīkki nilam Aṟupatiṟṟu veliyum meṟpaṭiyār kāṇiyāṉa pukaḻāparaṇaṉ nilam Aṟuveliyum maturāntaka nallūr pāḷaṉ centaṉ kuṭinilam Aiñce mukkāl veliyum kiḷiñalūr nilam patiṟṟu veliyum cāttaṉūr
nilam patiṉaiyveliyum Āvaṇattiṟ palar pakkalum vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam Eṭṭekālum Ivvūrkaḷil vilaikoṇṭa nilam patiṉoru veliyum Āka nilam nūṟṟu Orupattāṟu veliyum Epperppaṭṭa Aṉaittu vaṟkaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa Aiñcāvatu Āṉi māta mutal Ivvakarattup paṭṭarkaḷukku bhūdāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉubhavikkavum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷukku vikkiramapāṇṭiya caruppetimaṅkalattup paṭṭarkaḷ Iṟuttu varumpaṭi
ye veli Oṉṟukku nāṟ kalamāka vaṉta poṉakap paḻa nellut tillaināyakaṉ perumpaṇṭāratte Ūriḷaṅkālāle Aḷakkavum Iṉṉilam Ivvakarattukku Ippaṭi bhūtāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākavum Ivarkaḷ ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku patiṉoruper nācciyār koyilile cibaliyaḷavile pradakṣiṇam paṇṇi Āśirvvādam paṇṇavum Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu 5vatu nāḷ 3 100 5 10 1 mutalāka kalveṭṭi koṇṭu IṟṟayiliyākaRead iṟaiyiliyākaAṉu
pavikka paṇṇuka § Ivai ceyāṉamuṭaiyāṉ Āṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 28.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
